heading: Supervision of systems and programs by Secretary
label: 5509 Supervision of systems and programs by Secretary
notes: Amendments1988—Subsec. (a). substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “National Bureau of Standards”.Pub. L. 100–418
amendments: Amendments1988—Subsec. (a). substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “National Bureau of Standards”.Pub. L. 100–418

children.heading: Monitoring of performance; collection and evaluation of data; studies and investigation; reports to Congress
children.label: a Monitoring of performance; collection and evaluation of data; studies and investigation; reports to Congress

children.text: monitor the performance and operation of solar heating and combined solar heating and cooling systems installed in residential dwellings under this subchapter;

collect and evaluate data and information on the performance and operation of solar heating and combined solar heating and cooling systems installed in residential dwellings under this subchapter; and

from time to time, carrying out such studies and investigations and take such other actions, including the submission of special reports to the Congress when appropriate, as may be necessary to assure that the programs for which the Secretary is responsible under this subchapter effectively carry out the policy of this subchapter.

children.heading: Cooperation with scientific, technical, and professional societies and industry representatives in development of performance criteria and test procedures
children.label: b Cooperation with scientific, technical, and professional societies and industry representatives in development of performance criteria and test procedures
children.text: In the development of the performance criteria and test procedures required under sections 5503, 5504, and 5506 of this title, the Secretary shall work closely with the appropriate scientific, technical, and professional societies and industry representatives to insure the best possible use of available expertise in this area.

children.heading: Continued liaison with building and related industries and scientific and technical communities
children.label: c Continued liaison with building and related industries and scientific and technical communities
children.text: The Secretary shall also maintain continuing liaison with the building industry and related industries and interests, and with the scientific and technical community during and after the period of the programs carried out under this subchapter, in order to assure that the projected benefits of such programs are and will continue to be realized.
